## Meeting Purpose

[Conduct an interview with Joanna Kaminska for a Managing Editor position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Joanna has extensive experience in content marketing, SEO, and strategy for SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses AI workflows to produce high-volume, quality content (up to 50,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [The role involves client management, content strategy, and overseeing content managers](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [growthx.ai is rapidly growing, with a startup environment that encourages autonomy and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

## Topics

### Joanna's Background and Experience

  - [Worked primarily with SaaS companies in content marketing and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Expertise in creating content strategies, mentoring writers, and managing content programs](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Experience with both self-serve and enterprise go-to-market strategies](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Strong focus on SEO-driven content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### growthx.ai's Content Production Process

  - [Utilizes AI workflows in AirOps for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Process includes brief creation, research, outline generation, and article writing](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Human oversight and editing throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Produces up to 50,000 words per month (about 10 articles per week)](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Managing Editor Role Responsibilities

  - [Develop content strategies for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Oversee content managers and their work](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Conduct client meetings and present strategies/results](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Collaborate with the engineering team to improve AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Fast-growing startup (from 20 to 60 employees recently)](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Encourages autonomy, problem-solving, and creating new solutions](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Supportive management style focused on enabling employees](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Remote work with flexible schedules, though some evening availability required for US client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

### Tech Stack and AI Integration

  - [Custom-built AI workflows in AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Dedicated engineering team for improving and maintaining AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Employees encouraged to provide feedback and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to provide feedback to Marilla on the interview](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2352.0)
  - [Confirm Joanna's preferred salary range within the 40-80k bracket](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2574.0)
  - [Determine Joanna's potential start date](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2703.0)
  - [Marilla to contact Joanna with next steps in the hiring process, likely within a week](https://fathom.video/share/6BgcVpCb7ceryT421bP8xHeWF-9cEBDv?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
